name: Pixelle-Video SQLite Database
description: 零一数字人导购平台数据库查询配置

templates.name: 所有模板
templates.sql: SELECT id, name, type, status, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM templates ORDER BY updated_at DESC
templates.description: 列出所有模板，按更新时间排序

templates.name: 已发布模板
templates.sql: SELECT id, name, type, published_at FROM templates WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY published_at DESC

templates.name: 模板搜索
templates.sql: SELECT id, name, type, status FROM templates WHERE name LIKE ? OR description LIKE ? ORDER BY updated_at DESC
templates.description: 按名称或描述搜索模板

digital_humans.name: 所有数字人
digital_humans.sql: SELECT id, name, status, voice_clone_id, last_trained_at, created_at FROM digital_humans ORDER BY created_at DESC

digital_humans.name: 可用数字人
digital_humans.sql: SELECT id, name, voice_clone_id, image_model_id, last_trained_at FROM digital_humans WHERE status = 'ready' ORDER BY last_trained_at DESC
digital_humans.description: 仅显示训练完成的数字人

digital_humans.name: 训练失败数字人
digital_humans.sql: SELECT id, name, training_error, last_trained_at FROM digital_humans WHERE status = 'failed'
digital_humans.description: 显示训练失败的数字人及其错误信息

render_jobs.name: 最近渲染任务
render_jobs.sql: SELECT id, template_id, status, progress, pipeline_key, created_at, updated_at FROM render_jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

render_jobs.name: 渲染任务按状态统计
render_jobs.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM render_jobs GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
render_jobs.description: 按状态统计渲染任务数量

render_jobs.name: 失败渲染任务
render_jobs.sql: SELECT id, template_id, error_message, created_at FROM render_jobs WHERE status = 'failed' ORDER BY created_at DESC

render_jobs.name: 进行中的渲染任务
render_jobs.sql: SELECT id, template_id, status, progress, stage, started_at FROM render_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued', 'parsing', 'scene_gen', 'video_gen', 'ffmpeg') ORDER BY created_at DESC
render_jobs.description: 显示正在执行的渲染任务

render_jobs.name: 渲染任务平均耗时
render_jobs.sql: SELECT pipeline_key, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(julianday(completed_at) - julianday(started_at)) * 24 * 60 as avg_minutes FROM render_jobs WHERE status = 'completed' AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pipeline_key
render_jobs.description: 按流水线统计平均渲染耗时（分钟）

logs.name: 渲染任务日志
logs.sql: SELECT r.id, r.level, r.message, r.created_at FROM render_logs r WHERE r.render_job_id = ? ORDER BY r.created_at
logs.description: 查询特定渲染任务的所有日志

logs.name: 错误日志
logs.sql: SELECT r.render_job_id, r.level, r.message, r.created_at FROM render_logs r WHERE r.level = 'error' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

library.name: 素材库分类统计
library.sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM library_items GROUP BY category
library.description: 按分类统计素材库项目

library.name: 活跃素材
library.sql: SELECT id, name, category, status, created_at FROM library_items WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
library.description: 显示活跃的素材库项目

assets.name: 所有资源
assets.sql: SELECT id, name, type, file_url, created_at FROM assets ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30

assets.name: 资源按类型统计
assets.sql: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM assets GROUP BY type

analytics.name: 每日渲染量
analytics.sql: SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM render_jobs GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30
analytics.description: 最近30天每日渲染任务量

analytics.name: 成功率统计
analytics.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 'success' WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 'failed' ELSE 'other' END as result, COUNT(*) as count FROM render_jobs GROUP BY result
